name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Messages are tuples: [sender \in Participants, receiver \in Participants, type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, content \in {"", "VoteYes", "VoteNo"}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants, receiver \in Participants, type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, content \in {"", "VoteYes", "VoteNo"}]

(* Initial state: all participants are in the "Init" state, coordinator is in "Start" state, no messages *)
Init == /\ participants = [i \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ coordinator = "Start"
        /\ messages = {}

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
SendPrepare == /\ coordinator = "Start"
               /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> i, type |-> "Prepare", content |-> ""] : i \in Participants }
               /\ coordinator' = "WaitingForVotes"
               /\ participants' = participants

(* Participants receive Prepare and vote Yes *)
ReceivePrepareAndVoteYes == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
                           /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = "Prepare" /\ msg.receiver \in Participants /\ participants[msg.receiver] = "Init"
                           /\ messages' = messages \ { msg }
                           /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "VotedYes"]
                           /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> msg.receiver, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "VoteYes", content |-> "VoteYes"] }

(* Participants receive Prepare and vote No *)
ReceivePrepareAndVoteNo == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
                          /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = "Prepare" /\ msg.receiver \in Participants /\ participants[msg.receiver] = "Init"
                          /\ messages' = messages \ { msg }
                          /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "VotedNo"]
                          /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> msg.receiver, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "VoteNo", content |-> "VoteNo"] }

(* Coordinator receives all Yes votes and sends Commit *)
SendCommit == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
              /\ \A i \in Participants : participants[i] = "VotedYes"
              /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> i, type |-> "Commit", content |-> ""] : i \in Participants }
              /\ coordinator' = "Committed"
              /\ participants' = participants

(* Coordinator receives any No vote and sends Abort *)
SendAbort == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
             /\ \E i \in Participants : participants[i] = "VotedNo"
             /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> i, type |-> "Abort", content |-> ""] : i \in Participants }
             /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"
             /\ participants' = participants

(* Participants receive Commit and transition to Committed *)
ReceiveCommit == /\ coordinator \in {"Committed", "Aborted"}
                /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = "Commit" /\ msg.receiver \in Participants /\ participants[msg.receiver] = "VotedYes"
                /\ messages' = messages \ { msg }
                /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "Committed"]
                /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Participants receive Abort and transition to Aborted *)
ReceiveAbort == /\ coordinator \in {"Committed", "Aborted"}
               /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = "Abort" /\ msg.receiver \in Participants /\ participants[msg.receiver] = "VotedYes"
               /\ messages' = messages \ { msg }
               /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "Aborted"]
               /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == SendPrepare \/ ReceivePrepareAndVoteYes \/ ReceivePrepareAndVoteNo \/ SendCommit \/ SendAbort \/ ReceiveCommit \/ ReceiveAbort

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \in [Participants -> {"Init", "VotedYes", "VotedNo", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
          /\ coordinator \in {"Start", "WaitingForVotes", "Committed", "Aborted"}
          /\ messages \subseteq Message

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a set of fork indices {1, 2, ..., N} *)
Forks == {1, 2, ..., N}

(* States: a function from philosopher indices to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
States == [i \in Forks |-> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == forks = Forks /\ states = [i \in Forks |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper: determine the left and right fork indices for philosopher i *)
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Helper: check if philosopher i can eat (both adjacent forks are free) *)
CanEat(i) == LeftFork(i) \in forks /\ RightFork(i) \in forks

(* Action: philosopher i picks up forks and starts eating *)
TakeForks(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "hungry"
    /\ CanEat(i)
    /\ forks' = forks \ {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
PutForks(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks' = forks \cup {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "thinking"
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    /\ forks' = forks

(* Next action: any philosopher can become hungry, or any philosopher who can eat can start eating, or any philosopher who is eating can put down forks *)
Next == \E i \in Forks : 
    (Hungry(i) \/ TakeForks(i) \/ PutForks(i))

(* Type invariant: forks is a subset of Forks, states is a function from Forks to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \subseteq Forks
    /\ states \in [Forks -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* TypeOK ensures num is a sequence of N integers, flag is a sequence of N booleans *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in Seq(N)
          /\ flag \in Seq(N)

(* Helper functions *)
Less(i, j) == /\ flag[i] /\ flag[j]
              /\ (num[i] < num[j] \/ (num[i] = num[j] /\ i < j))

MaxNum == IF N = 0 THEN 0 ELSE Max(num)

(* Initialization: all flag false, all num 0 *)
Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Next action: process i can be in choosing or critical section *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = MaxNum + 1]
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: no two processes in critical section simultaneously *)
MutualExclusion == \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => ~ (flag[i] /\ flag[j] /\ Less(i, j))

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> -> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Producer(x) == /\ size < K
              /\ q[tail] = 0
              /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = x]
              /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
              /\ size' = size + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

Consumer(y) == /\ size > 0
              /\ y = q[head]
              /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
              /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
              /\ size' = size - 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

Next == \E x \in Nat : Producer(x)
      \/ \E y \in Nat : Consumer(y)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Servers

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Servers
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower

(* Candidate wins if it gets a majority of votes *)
MajorityWins == \E votes \in SUBSET Servers :
  /\ Cardinality(votes) > Cardinality(Servers) \div 2
  /\ \A s \in votes : s = Candidate

Next == 
  (* Follower to Candidate transition *)
  \/ /\ state = Follower
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = Candidate
     /\ state' = Candidate
  (* Candidate to Leader transition *)
  \/ /\ state = Candidate
     /\ MajorityWins
     /\ state' = Leader
  (* No state change *)
  \/ /\ state' = state
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Channels

VARIABLES state, channel, markerSent, markerReceived

(* State of each process: 0 = not recorded, 1 = recorded *)
State == [p \in 1..N |-> 0 |-> 1]

(* Channel state: sequence of messages *)
ChannelState == [c \in Channels |-> Seq]

(* MarkerSent: set of channels along which marker has been sent *)
MarkerSent == [c \in Channels |-> BOOLEAN]

(* MarkerReceived: set of channels along which marker has been received *)
MarkerReceived == [c \in Channels |-> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: no process has recorded state, channels empty, no markers sent/received *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
        /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

(* Next action: either send a regular message or send a marker *)
Next == 
  \E p \in 1..N : \E q \in 1..N : \E c \in Channels :
    /\ c = <<p, q>>
    /\ \E msg \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = 0
        /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Append(channel[c], msg)]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerSent, markerReceived>>
    \/ \E msg \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = 1
        /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Append(channel[c], msg)]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerSent, markerReceived>>
    \/ /\ state[p] = 0
       /\ channel' = channel
       /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerReceived>>

(* Receive action: process a message from a channel *)
Receive == 
  \E c \in Channels : \E p \in 1..N : \E q \in 1..N :
    /\ c = <<p, q>>
    /\ channel[c] /= <<>>
    /\ msg = Head(channel[c])
    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(channel[c])]
    /\ IF msg = 0 THEN
         /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = 1]
         /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
         /\ UNCHANGED <<markerSent>>

         /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerSent, markerReceived>>

(* Next action: either send or receive *)
Next == Send \/ Receive

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, markerSent, markerReceived>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in State
          /\ channel \in ChannelState
          /\ markerSent \in [Channels |-> BOOLEAN]
          /\ markerReceived \in [Channels |-> BOOLEAN]

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES
VARIABLES ackedChunks, lostChunks, retransCount, sentChunks, seqNum, state

    /\ state \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting", "done", "failed"}
    /\ seqNum \in 0..Len(File)
    /\ retransCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ sentChunks \in SUBSET 0..Len(File)
    /\ ackedChunks \in SUBSET 0..Len(File)
    /\ lostChunks \in SUBSET 0..Len(File)

Init ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ seqNum = 0
    /\ retransCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ lostChunks = {}

SendChunk ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ seqNum < Len(File)
    /\ state' = "sending"
    /\ seqNum' = seqNum + 1
    /\ retransCount' = 0
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {seqNum}
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks

ReceiveAck ==
    /\ state = "waiting"
    /\ seqNum \in ackedChunks
    /\ state' = "idle"
    /\ seqNum' = seqNum
    /\ retransCount' = 0
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks

Timeout ==
    /\ state = "waiting"
    /\ retransCount < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ state' = "sending"
    /\ retransCount' = retransCount + 1
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks

GiveUp ==
    /\ state = "waiting"
    /\ retransCount = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ state' = "failed"
    /\ seqNum' = seqNum
    /\ retransCount' = retransCount
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks

Done ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ seqNum = Len(File)
    /\ state' = "done"
    /\ seqNum' = seqNum
    /\ retransCount' = retransCount
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ lostChunks' = lostChunks

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ ReceiveAck
    \/ Timeout
    \/ GiveUp
    \/ Done

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, seqNum, retransCount, sentChunks, ackedChunks, lostChunks>>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES db, txns, nextTxId, v


  txns = <<>>;  (* sequence of transaction records *)
  nextTxId = 1;  (* next transaction ID *)

actions
  BeginTx == 
    /\ txns' = Append(txns, [id |-> nextTxId, status |-> "active", snapshot |-> db, writes |-> <<>>])
    /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED db

  Read(txId, idx) == 
    /\ txId \in {t.id : t \in txns}
    /\ idx \in 1..Len(db)
    /\ \E t \in txns : t.id = txId /\ t.status = "active"
    /\ UNCHANGED db /\ UNCHANGED txns /\ UNCHANGED nextTxId

  Write(txId, val) == 
    /\ txId \in {t.id : t \in txns}
    /\ \E t \in txns : t.id = txId /\ t.status = "active"
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId] = [@ EXCEPT !writes = Append(@.writes, val)]]
    /\ UNCHANGED db /\ UNCHANGED nextTxId

  Commit(txId) == 
    /\ txId \in {t.id : t \in txns}
    /\ \E t \in txns : t.id = txId /\ t.status = "active"
    /\ \A t \in txns : t.id = txId => 
        \A v \in t.writes : v \notin {v' : v' \in db}
    /\ db' = Append(db, t.writes)
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId] = [@ EXCEPT !status = "committed"]]
    /\ UNCHANGED nextTxId

  Abort(txId) == 
    /\ txId \in {t.id : t \in txns}
    /\ \E t \in txns : t.id = txId /\ t.status = "active"
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId] = [@ EXCEPT !status = "aborted"]]
    /\ UNCHANGED db /\ UNCHANGED nextTxId
*)

TypeOK ==
  /\ db \in Seq(Seq(Int))
  /\ txns \in Seq([id: Int)), writes: Seq(Seq(Int))])
  /\ nextTxId \in Nat

Init ==
  /\ db = <<>>
  /\ txns = <<>>
  /\ nextTxId = 1

Next ==
  BeginTx \/ 
  \E txId, idx \in 1..Len(txns) : Read(txId, idx) \/ 
  \E txId, val \in 1..Len(db) : Write(txId, val) \/ 
  \E txId \in 1..Len(txns) : Commit(txId) \/ 
  \E txId \in 1..Len(txns) : Abort(txId)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns, nextTxId>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
       /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Request(c) == /\ c \in Clients
              /\ free /= {}
              /\ c \notin DOMAIN allocated
                 \/ allocated[c] = {}
              /\ c \in DOMAIN allocated
                 /\ allocated[c] = {}
              /\ c \notin DOMAIN allocated
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = {}]
                 /\ free' = free \ {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}
              \/ /\ c \in DOMAIN allocated
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = {}]
                 /\ free' = free \ {CHOOSE p \in free : TRUE}
              /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  (* placeholder for other variables *)

Release(c) == /\ c \in DOMAIN allocated
              /\ allocated[c] /= {}
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = {}]
              /\ free' = free \cup allocated[c]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  (* placeholder for other variables *)

Next == \E c \in Clients : Request(c) \/ Release(c)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \subseteq [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, inbox

(* Type definitions *)
Topic == Int
Message == [topic: Topic, content: Int]
Subscriber == [id: Int, interests: SUBSET Topic, inbox: Seq Message]

(* State predicates *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ subscribers \in SUBSET (SUBSET Topic)
    /\ messages \in Seq Message

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ subscribers = <<>>
    /\ messages = <<>>

(* Action: Register a subscriber with interests *)
Register(sub, interests) == 
    /\ sub \notin subscribers
    /\ subscribers' = Append(subscribers, [id |-> sub, interests |-> interests, inbox |-> <<>>])
    /\ UNCHANGED messages

(* Action: Post a message on a topic *)
Post(msg) == 
    /\ msg \in messages
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, msg)
    /\ UNCHANGED subscribers

(* Action: Deliver messages to subscribers *)
Deliver == 
    /\ \E sub \in subscribers:
        /\ \E msg \in messages:
            /\ msg.topic \in sub.interests
            /\ sub.inbox' = Append(sub.inbox, msg)
    /\ UNCHANGED messages

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E sub \in subscribers : \E interests \in SUBSET Topic :
        Register(sub, interests)
    \/ \E msg \in messages:
        Post(msg)
    \/ Deliver

(* Temporal specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in [ {0,1} -> BOOLEAN ]
